case_title: SH EMPIREMARKET, INC. VS. YUNG KYU KIM

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-12-2020 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION TO SEP-11-2020 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-11-2020 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF SH EMPIREMARKET, INC. REPRESENTED BY SEUNG HWAN LEE, STORE LESSEE, IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT YUNG KYU KIM IS PRESENT AND IS ASSISTED BY SOON KIM, WIFE. KOREAN INTERPERTER OATH IS GIVE TO SOON KIM AND ALSO SERVICE AS WITNESS FOR DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS REVIEWED AND RETURNED. COMMISSIONER PANG LY; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SH EMPIREMARKET, INC. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT KIM, YUNG KYU STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY SH EMPIREMARKET, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT KIM, YUNG KYU ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-12-2020 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
